name: muscle-guessing-game
description: ``` musclele/ ├── server.js          ← Node.js/Express backend ├── package.json       ← Dependencies ├── .env └── public/     ├── index.html ← Pure HTML only      ├── pages/     │   ├── auth.html ← Login / register / guest     │   ├── home.html ← Hero banner + mode cards     │   ├── game.html ← Clues, grid, keyboard     │   └── stats.html ← Stats, leaderboard     ├── css/     │   └── styles.css ← All CSS     ├── js/     │   ├── config.js ← API URL, difficulty, timer         ├── router.js ← Fetches & injects page fragments       │   ├── auth.js ← Login, register, auto-login, sign-out     │   ├── game.js ← Grid, tiles, keyboard, clues, timer, result     │   └── stats.js ← Stats, guess distribution, leaderboard     └── lang/en/         └── en.js ← Every UI string + the full muscle database ```
